title: stelis nigriflora
intro: Stelis nigriflora, also known as the black-flowered Stelis, is a type of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Stelis nigriflora include its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is also used in some herbal remedies to treat digestive issues and skin conditions.
